title: Stellantis’ Leapmotor partnership points to a wider — and riskier— industry gamble
summary_full: A recent tie-up between Jeep maker Stellantis and China's Leapmotor is seen as a watershed moment for the future of European carmaking.
summary_public: A recent tie-up between Jeep maker Stellantis and China's Leapmotor is seen as a watershed moment for the future of European carmaking.
